prediction.reasoning: For a 2-day prediction of ABBV, I used typical short-term stock volatility patterns for large-cap pharmaceutical stocks. ABBV has historically shown daily volatility around 1.5-2%. The point estimate assumes no directional bias over such a short timeframe. The confidence intervals are based on assumed daily standard deviation of approximately 1.2%, scaled for 2 days (√2 factor), with appropriate z-scores for each confidence level (0.67, 1.28, 1.65 respectively).
